content:
Ok, that may be a dramatic thread title... but I just wanted to let everyone know we've now got a release of roc-wasm4 for the new compiler.

This time around it comes with some nice upgrades. You can be up an running with just installing roc and w4 and then it is as simple as the below to be playing your game.

roc build app.roc
w4 run app.wasm

No need to have a zig toolchain installed and be manually linking anything.

Also I think I just got a new high score ... so there's that. :grinning_face_with_smiling_eyes:
It works beautifully, it's so easy to use, I love it! Plus I beat your high score.
I thought this was about Elixir's pheonix framework :sweat_smile:
@Aurélien Geron I give up trying to beat yours... I cant go past 11
